title: bupleurum tenuissimum f. normale
intro: Bupleurum tenuissimum f. normale, also known as Chinese thin-leaved bupleurum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its ability to balance the body's energy and reduce stress. The health benefits of Bupleurum tenuissimum f. normale include its potential to support the immune system, alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, and improve liver function. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum tenuissimum f. normale is often used in combination with other herbs, such as glycyrrhiza and licorice root, and can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or extract.
